responseText:
You’ll get this on Discord automatically now.

- Only `gold_rate_1min` remains (every **60s**) and it’s configured to DM you (`senderId: 1093521227831857283`).
- Expect the next DM **within ~1 minute**.
- If you don’t see it: run `tail -f ~/.tinyclaw/logs/discord.log` and look for `Sent proactive message to mhd.zeeq`.
